ogTitle: East Rockingham vs East Wickepin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Rockingham and East Wickepin.
heading: East Rockingham vs East Wickepin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Rockingham, Western Australia and East Wickepin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Rockingham has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to East Wickepin (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Rockingham or East Wickepin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Rockingham has a flood risk score of 43/100, while East Wickepin scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Rockingham scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. East Wickepin scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Rockingham or East Wickepin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Rockingham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
